arts.ttl: Haway The Podcast | REACTION | Sporting Lisbon 1-0 Sunderland
arts.sum: Sunderland lost against Portuguese champions Sporting Lisbon to close out our mini-tour of the Algarve, but there were plenty of positives to take from our performance and, as such, the Lads got together at full time to react to what they saw. Join us as we chat about Sporting Lisbon 1-0 Sunderland — a spirited, promising performance from The Lads in the Algarve!

arts.ttl: Andy’s Player Ratings: Sunderland 0-1 Sporting Lisbon — Plenty of positives in defeat
arts.sum: Got forward well to combine with Diarra and Talbi, getting in a couple of shots at goal but didn’t look quite at it defensively and gave a bit too much room to his man out wide, with a few unopposed crosses coming in. Neat and tidy down the right for a lot of the first half but then burst into life with runs inside later in the half, one got him a left-footed effort on goal that was easily saved, then played a one-two with Hume and put in a nice ball for Mayenda to run on to.
